notes.introduction: An exposition of Mark 5:1-20 on the conversion and commission of the demoniac of Gadara, centered on Christ's instruction in v. 19 to go home and tell friends what the Lord has done. Personal testimony as a mode of witness is examined alongside parallel passages in Luke 1, John 17, Matthew 28, and Philippians.
themes: the power of christ over demons
purpose of the believer in the world

sections.heading: The Swine and the Crowd's Response
